name: Upload Security
description: Block dangerous file uploads, enforce MIME allowlists, and limit upload sizes.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Max upload size (MB)
settings.description: Reject uploads larger than this size.

settings.label: Block double extensions
settings.description: Reject filenames like image.php.jpg or document.exe.png.

settings.label: Allowed MIME types
settings.description: Comma-separated list. Leave empty to allow all non-blocked types.

settings.label: Track blocked uploads
settings.description: Count blocked upload attempts in the dashboard widget.
